title: Elysium Spa 100% Natural Bath Salts - Bubblegum Burst (450g)
features: SOOTHING MUSCLE RELIEF: Infused with 100% natural magnesium sulphate, these bath salts help to ease sore muscles and relieve tension, making them perfect for a muscle soak after an intense workout. Sink into a warm bath and feel the stress melt away as the salts soothe tired, aching muscles.

CHOOSE FROM 3 INVIGORATING SCENTS: Choose your relaxation experience with three delightful scents: Juicy Apple, Cherry Bomb, or Bubblegum Burst. Whether you prefer something fresh, fruity, or sweet, there’s a scent to suit every mood and moment, making each bath a personalised spa experience.

TRANSFORMS YOUR BATH INTO A SPA-LIKE EXPERIENCE: Turn your ordinary bath into a luxurious retreat with Elysium Spa bath salts. The soothing power of magnesium salts for the bath, combined with their delightful aromas, will help you unwind and relax, giving you a moment of calm in your busy day.

GREAT FOR FOOT SOAKS: These salts aren’t just for the bath—they’re perfect as salts for feet too. Give your tired feet the pampering they deserve after a long day, easing aches and pains while leaving them feeling soft and refreshed.

HELPS PROMOTE BETTER SLEEP: Magnesium is known for its relaxing properties, and these bath salts are a great way to prepare for a restful night. Use them in your evening bath to unwind before bed, easing your mind and body for deep, restorative sleep.
description: Product Description Step into pure relaxation with Elysium Spa's luxurious bath salts, designed to soothe tired muscles, refresh the senses, and leave your skin feeling soft and pampered. Infused with 100% natural magnesium sulphate, these salts create the perfect bath soak for anyone seeking calm after a long day. With three delightful scents to choose from—Juicy Apple, Cherry Bomb, and Bubblegum Burst—there’s something for everyone, whether you’re craving a fruity escape or a playful, sweet-smelling bath experience. These salts are perfect for unwinding after a workout, as a foot soak to ease weary feet, or simply for turning bath time into a fragrant, spa-like retreat. Whether it's for a full-body muscle soak or a quick, refreshing foot soak, Elysium Spa bath salts will transform your bath into a peaceful getaway. Let these salts work their magic on your skin, softening and rejuvenating while you soak. The magnesium salts for baths help to relax muscles, ease tension, and revive your body, making them perfect for after an intense workout or a long day at work. Plus, the fun and vibrant scents—Juicy Apple, Cherry Bomb, and Bubblegum Burst—add a sensory layer of indulgence, ensuring every bath feels like a luxurious escape. These Elysium Spa bath salts will leave your skin smooth and your mind calm, giving you a moment of peace in your busy day. So, whether you're preparing for a restful night's sleep or just need a moment to relax, these salts have you covered. Ingredients Magnesium Sulphate, Parfum. Directions Add a generous amount (approximately two handfuls) to warm, running bath water for a wonderfully soothing and relaxing bath. Soak for at least 20 minutes to allow the skin to soften, so the natural minerals can be absorbed. Safety Warning Caution: Keep out of reach of children. For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. If irritation occurs, discontinue use. See more
